modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be several noticeable typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Documents not showing in DocuSign, page keeps loading.

full_description_text:  
I'm trying to access some documents in DocuSign, but they just won't show up. The page keeps loading and loading, but nothing appears. I got an error saying the envelope or account activation isn't found, and it might be recalled or need more processing. Plus, I think there might be an issue with authentication too.
short_description: Documents not showing in DocuSign, page keeps loading.
description: I'm trying to access some documents in DocuSign, but they just won't show up. The page keeps loading and loading, but nothing appears.
